name: Virginia DPOR Contractor License Lookup

agency.name: Virginia Department of Professional and Occupational Regulation

updateFrequency: unknown; verify against the official lookup and disclaimer before relying on freshness assumptions
licenseTypesIncluded: DPOR contractor and trades records exposed by the public lookup
knownExclusions: The lookup is not modeled as a confirmed bulk public dataset.
DPOR scope does not represent every local permit, business registration, or non-DPOR construction authorization in Virginia.
rateLimitNotes: No adapter is implemented. Any future automated access must account for the official lookup disclaimer and technical controls.
publicRecordsNotes: Official lookup source metadata only. The DPOR lookup includes its own legal disclaimer; absence from this source is not proof that a license does not exist elsewhere.
officialBulkDownloadNotes: No official bulk download has been confirmed in this phase.
researchNotes: Registry-only source for now because the official path is lookup-oriented and has source-specific legal/disclaimer language.
maintainerNotes: Future adapter work should preserve DPOR disclaimer wording and avoid treating lookup data as a complete public-records export.
